# LUCIA "LUX" REYES

> *"Sin Miedo, papi. Be safe mi amor."*

---

## IDENTIFIERS

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Full Name | Lucia "Lux" Reyes |
| Son | [[Angel Reyes]] |
| Late Partner | [[Dmitri Volkov]] (killed, 70 shots) |
| Faction | Ghost Town Crips — Queen. Commander. |
| Legal status | Under **FBI RICO investigation** |

---

## WHO SHE IS

La Reina de Ghost Town. Runs the organisation Dmitri Volkov helped her build. Cold, strategic, brilliant — the kind of person who can love her son completely while understanding he is also a tactical asset.

She is the reason Angel is alive. She is also the reason he had to leave.

---

## THE PHONE CALL ([[Track 06 — Volkov Legacy]])

*"Mijo. It's your madre... Sin Miedo, papi. Be safe mi amor. Love mijo."*

Said to a boy who told her: *"I ain't safe. None of this is safe. I'm wearing a target."*

---

## TRACK 09

She heard [[Track 09 — Dog On Sermon]] via headset connected by [[Dame]] from inside [[The Kennel]]. She was in Oakland. She heard 65 London gang members learn that her son tried to kill himself with 72 pills and her dead partner's vodka.

Dame held the headset. She could hear Lux on the other end. Camera caught Dame's face. No one needed to hear the sound to understand.

---

## THE PELICAN CASE

Lux sent the [[Pelican Case]] to [[Room 114]] through Angel. It contains: bulletproof vests, ballistic masks, [[Dmitri Volkov]]'s custom 9mm pistol, ammunition, a Siberian fur coat — and a sealed envelope addressed *"For Katarina. From the woman who loved him."*

**Katarina = [[Dame]].** Written by Lux about Dmitri. Neither woman is ready for this.

---

## THE NAME

*"Lux"* = Latin for light. She could not give [[Dmitri Volkov]] biological children. She gave him Angel instead. Track 09: *"from the light that was bright but wasn't enough Lux."*

---

- [[Angel Reyes]] — her son
